subject: fix(api): correct API contract mismatches found during review
body:
Breaking fixes:
- PUT /proposals/:id: response_content → responseContent (camelCase)
- POST /pdf-verifications: agreement_id → agreementId (camelCase)

Data loss prevention:
- Module intent/summary fields: split into API fields (title, content,
  nudge, expire) + direct Supabase for unsupported fields (intent,
  summary_does, summary_when, summary_consequence)
- Note/proposal sender_tone: create via API then update tone via Supabase
- Both are temporary until tool-till-tees validation is updated

Architecture fix:
- GET endpoints for agreements, modules, notes, proposals, pdf-verifications
  require parent ID params — restored Supabase for global initial fetch
  (hooks use global store + client-side filtering)
- Notifications and signatures work without params — kept on API
- Removed dead resetSequenceSignatures (unused, sent empty body)
- Cleaned up createAgreement to not send server-determined fields

Tags: bugfix, api, migration
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: added
Epic: api-migration
Semver: patch

title: correct API contract mismatches found during review
